page.breadcrumbNav: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-5 overflow-x-auto
page.breadcrumbList: flex flex-nowrap items-center text-sm text-[var(--ds-text)]/60 whitespace-nowrap min-w-0
page.main: product-page-minimal max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-12 md:py-20
page.galleryBox: relative bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/30 overflow-hidden border border-[var(--ds-beige)] rounded-2xl shadow-sm group
page.imageCounter: absolute bottom-3 right-3 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md bg-[var(--ds-text)]/80 text-[var(--ds-ivory)] text-xs font-medium tracking-wide
page.navBtn: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--ds-ivory)]/95 border border-[var(--ds-beige)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm text-[var(--ds-text)] hover:text-[var(--ds-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ds-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.navBtnNext: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--ds-ivory)]/95 border border-[var(--ds-beige)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm text-[var(--ds-text)] hover:text-[var(--ds-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ds-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.thumbStrip: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 pt-1 snap-x scrollbar-hide
page.thumbBtn: relative flex-none aspect-square w-24 overflow-hidden snap-start border-2 rounded-lg border-[var(--ds-beige)] hover:border-[var(--ds-accent)] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ds-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/20
page.descriptionSection: product-details-section rounded-2xl bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/20 border border-[var(--ds-beige)] overflow-hidden shadow-sm
page.descriptionHeaderTitle: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--ds-text)] flex items-center gap-3
page.descriptionHeaderIcon: w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-[var(--ds-border)] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 text-[var(--ds-text)]
page.descriptionContentInner: rounded-xl bg-[var(--ds-surface)] border border-[var(--ds-border)] shadow-sm overflow-hidden
page.descriptionContent: prose prose-sm max-w-none overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 text-[var(--ds-text)]
page.descriptionOverlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 pointer-events-none bg-gradient-to-t from-[var(--ds-surface)] via-[var(--ds-surface)]/90 to-transparent
page.showMoreBtn: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--ds-text)] hover:text-[var(--ds-text)] bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/30 hover:bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/50 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-[var(--ds-beige)] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ds-text)] focus:ring-offset-2
page.detailInfoBox: flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 rounded-xl bg-[var(--ds-surface)] border border-[var(--ds-border)] shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-[var(--ds-accent)]
page.detailInfoIcon: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[var(--ds-border)] flex-shrink-0 text-[var(--ds-text)]
page.relatedCardRoot: group product-card flex flex-col h-full bg-[var(--ds-surface)] rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-[var(--ds-border)] hover:border-[var(--ds-beige)] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.25)]
page.relatedCardMedia: relative aspect-[3/4] min-h-[200px] overflow-hidden bg-[var(--ds-border)] flex items-center justify-center
page.relatedCardNoImageWrap: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[var(--ds-border)]
page.relatedCardSaleBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
page.relatedCardTitle: text-sm font-medium text-[var(--ds-text)] group-hover:text-[var(--ds-accent)] transition-colors line-clamp-2 leading-snug mb-2
page.relatedCardArrow: text-[var(--ds-muted)] group-hover:text-[var(--ds-text)] group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-all duration-200 flex-shrink-0
page.imageGridWrap: grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 lg:sticky lg:top-28 lg:self-start
page.imageGridItem: relative w-full aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-[var(--ds-beige)] bg-[var(--ds-beige)]/20
